scripts.sonar:all: npm run sonar && sh -c 'cd ../cicd-tasklist-backend && npm run sonar'
scripts.trivy:scan: mkdir -p reports && docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v "$(pwd)/reports:/reports" -v cicd-tasklist-frontend_trivy-cache:/root/.cache/trivy aquasec/trivy:latest image --scanners vuln --exit-code 1 --severity CRITICAL,HIGH --ignore-unfixed --no-progress --format json --output /reports/trivy-vulnerabilities.json efrei-pro-pipepline-exam-frontend:latest
scripts.trivy:sbom: mkdir -p reports && docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v "$(pwd)/reports:/reports" -v cicd-tasklist-frontend_trivy-cache:/root/.cache/trivy aquasec/trivy:latest image --format cyclonedx --output /reports/sbom.cdx.json efrei-pro-pipepline-exam-frontend:latest
scripts.trivy:ci: npm run trivy:build && npm run trivy:scan && npm run trivy:sbom
